Merc..Bladder: Frequent urging to urinate, dribbling a little; bloody urine, great burning.
Merc..Bladder, urination, frequent: Frequent urging to urinate, dribbling a little; bloody urine, great burning.
Merc..Chest: Most Merc cases begin in the nose and travel down the throat, creating rawness and scraping of the larynx, and rawness and soreness in the chest; laryngitis, tracheitis and bronchitis.
Merc..Heart & Circulation, palpitation: Tremendous orgasms, bubbling and flushes of heat in the chest.
Merc..Chill: The Merc. patient about to go into a chill is chilly even when the chill has not yet come on; sensitive to the moving air in a warm room; violently sensitive to a draught.
Merc..Extremities: Merc. especially affects the joints; inflammatory rheumatism with much swelling, aggravated from the heat of the bed and from uncovering.
Merc..Extremities, coldness: Cold hands and feet. The sweat is profuse and offensive.
Merc..Generalities: The patient is worse from the extremes of temperature, worse from both heat and cold. Both the symptoms and the patient are worse in a warm atmosphere, worse in the open air, and worse in the cold.
Merc..Generalities, pain, burning, internally: Another marked feature is the tendency to the formation of pus. With inflammation there is burning and stinging and the rapid formation of pus and the part is aggravated by both warmth and cold.
Merc..Generalities, weakness, enervation: The trembling, weakness, sweat, foetor, suppuration and ulceration, the aggravation at night and from heat and cold, give the earlier impressions of the remedy.
Merc..Genitalia female: The woman has much tribulation. Burning, stinging in ovaries. Screaming from pain. Stinging, tearing, cutting pains in the ovaries, patient covered with sweat. Copious, excoriating leucorrhoea, parts raw, sore, inflamed and itching.
Merc..Head: Merc. is suitable to rheumatic troubles of the scalp, and neuralgias and brain trouble when there are burning, stinging pains and pains affected by the weather, and when there are head troubles that have come on from suppressed discharges.
Merc..Mind: A marked feature running all through is hastiness; a hurried, restless, anxious, impulsive disposition.
Merc..Mind, irritability: Desire to kill persons contradicting her. Impulse to kill or commit suicide; sudden anger with impulse to do violence.
Merc..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: A marked feature running all through is hastiness; a hurried, restless, anxious, impulsive disposition.
Merc..Mind, restlessness, night: Anxious and restless as if some evil impended, worse at night, with sweat.
Merc..Mouth: The taste, tongue and mouth furnish important and distinctive symptoms. As the tongue is projected it is seen to be flabby, has a mealy surface, and is often pale. The imprint of the teeth is observed all round the edge of the tongue.
Merc..Mouth, dryness: The whole mucous membrane is sensitive and painful, burning, stinging and smarting; dryness with or without aphthous patches.
Merc..Rectum: It has a great variety of stools, of diarrhoea and constipation. It has a well-defined dysenteric condition. Slimy, bloody stools with much straining, he feels as if he could never finish, even when no more is passing, a "never-get-done" feeling.
Merc..Rectum, constipation: Constipation, bilious habits and disordered stomach.
Merc..Rectum, pain: Slimy, bloody stools with much straining, he feels as if he could never finish, even when no more is passing, a "never-get-done" feeling.
Merc..Rectum, pain, burning: Merc. cor. has a more violent attack, with violent urging to stool and to urinate, and intense suffering, with burning in the parts and the passage of pure blood.
Merc..Respiration: Most Merc cases begin in the nose and travel down the throat, creating rawness and scraping of the larynx, and rawness and soreness in the chest; laryngitis, tracheitis and bronchitis. Loss of voice, complete aphonia.
Merc..Respiration, difficult: The colds finally settle in the bronchial tubes; the chest feels as if it would burst and the cough is worse lying on the right side.
Merc..Skin: There are many skin symptoms; scurfy eruptions, vesicular eruptions, eruptions discharging pus. Vesicles burn and smart, with excoriating discharges, especially on the head. Much itching of the skin, violent, in all parts of the body, as from fleas, especially when warm in bed at night.
